requirement_groups.name: Breadth — Humanities / Literature / Arts
requirement_groups.description: 6 credits of humanities, literature, or arts breadth courses.
requirement_groups.notes: Many courses across departments satisfy this. Check course attributes in the UW course guide.

requirement_groups.name: Breadth — Natural Science
requirement_groups.description: 4-6 credits: one 4-5 credit lab course OR two courses totaling 6 credits.
requirement_groups.notes: Lab component required if satisfying with a single course.

requirement_groups.name: Communication Part A & Part B
requirement_groups.description: Must complete both Communication Part A and Part B designated courses.
requirement_groups.notes: Designated courses carry a mortarboard symbol in the course guide. ENGL 100 and INTEREGR 397 satisfy this for IE students.

requirement_groups.name: Ethnic Studies
requirement_groups.description: Must complete at least one Ethnic Studies designated course.
requirement_groups.notes: Designated courses carry a mortarboard symbol in the course guide.

requirement_groups.name: Quantitative Reasoning Part A & Part B
requirement_groups.description: Must complete both Quantitative Reasoning Part A and Part B designated courses.
requirement_groups.notes: Designated courses carry a mortarboard symbol. Math and CS courses often satisfy QR-A or QR-B.
